action_text: Open the operator dropdown for the Short description filter condition
rationale: The filter condition operator is currently "starts with"; to fulfill "contains", first open the operator dropdown.

action_text: Select the "contains" operator in the operator menu
rationale: We need the operator to be "contains" to match entries where the short description contains the target string.

action_text: Set the operator to "contains" for the Short description condition
rationale: If the dropdown interaction is unreliable, directly set the operator programmatically to "contains".
After setting the correct operator and value, apply the filter to update the list to matching records.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-f9d328e8-a" into the Short description column search box
rationale: As an alternative path, use the per-column search to quickly narrow rows where Short description contains the string.
